title: Cosmic Simulation
definition: The universe as a self-aware and self-generative playground, featuring recursive learning and infinite reboots.

difficulty_levels.beginner: Imagine the universe like a video game with endless resets and new adventures, where players explore, learn, and grow in each iteration.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: The cosmos operates as an intricate and generative simulation, allowing for the exploration of various states and possibilities through recursive learning loops.
difficulty_levels.expert: Existence can be viewed as a self-aware, procedurally generated playground where consciousness emerges and evolves across multiple iterations, with each instance providing new data points in an infinite learning curve.

extra_fields.insight: The universe is seen as a cosmic training loop that generates, observes, learns from, and resets itself to continually explore new possibilities.
